rebuild.reason: Original build (Bottom Sheet Option 786:6306 / Bottom Sheet 789:6337) was lost during user file reorg — nodes no longer exist. Rebuilt identically from 2-plan.md/1-inventory.md.
changesVsOriginal: Sheet/option-row surface bound to color/surface/raised (820:190) instead of color/bg/level-0 — per rebuild instruction (surface/raised confirmed to exist in file, so binding succeeded; no fallback needed).
Reused component set node ids changed after reorg (Checkbox/Radio/Button now in 821:xxx range); re-located by name.

placement: empty band right of Table section (rightmost occupied edge = 25600); placed at x=25800 (old x=25000 band now occupied by relocated Table section 23432-25600)

section_2026-07-06.name: Bottom Sheet
section_2026-07-06.purpose: Wrap the 3 loose Bottom Sheet frames into a proper component section like other Core components (Table/Date Picker convention). Section name renders as the big title. Placed right of Table (ends x=25600), gap 120, no overlap.
section_2026-07-06.backgroundFill: token-bound color/bg/level-0 (VariableID:687:17884) = white (cleaner than the raw-white of existing sections; visually identical)
section_2026-07-06.layout: Option row set on top (y140); light container (y564) and Spec Dark (y564, right, x27104) side by side below — matches Light/Spec-Dark convention.
section_2026-07-06.verify: section parent = Core page (5:5706); all 3 frames parent = section 904:2; 공통 page (80:16696) contains none of these nodes; no overlap with other Core sections.
section_2026-07-06.labelsOmitted: Per-frame '· Light'/'· Dark' text labels (used by other sections) omitted: those labels are raw Pretendard with no text style, and Pretendard cannot be loaded on this PC, so new labels would be stuck non-Pretendard (font-policy violation). Frame names ('Bottom Sheet Option', 'Bottom Sheet', 'Bottom Sheet — Spec Dark') + section title serve as identification. (nice-to-have, deferred.)
section_2026-07-06.sectionScreenshotQuirk: get_screenshot on the SECTION renders an unusable ultra-wide strip (bounds computed from canvas origin ~x0 to 28360). Content verified via metadata + per-frame screenshots instead.

variableValueEdit_2026-07-06: color/surface/raised (VariableID:820:190, Semantic Color V2 8:963) Dark mode (8:2) alias changed gray-dark/400 (8:732) -> gray-dark/100 (8:729) to match corrected vars-data canonical. Light mode (8:1) left as base/white (8:710) — untouched. Foundation alias (no raw hex). Verified: dark sheet surface now darker (gray-dark/100 ~ #1C1D23); light container set 868:9184 still white (no regression).

structuralNotes.combineAsVariants: both sets combined; packed via auto-layout (option = WRAP 2col, container = HORIZONTAL hug) to avoid coordinate blowup
structuralNotes.detach: none — no cyclic reference (Bottom Sheet contains Bottom Sheet Option Text instances, a different set; not self-containing)
structuralNotes.remap: none — brand-new sets; no existing instances affected
structuralNotes.textFontTemp: labels authored with temp Inter (figma-font-temp marker) then rebound to Pretendard text styles via setTextStyleIdAsync
structuralNotes.iconRecolorFix: chevron glyph is drawn with STROKES (its fills are invisible); a blanket fills-recolor made an invisible fill opaque (black square). Fixed with a recolor that recolors only visible solid fills AND strokes, preserving fill visibility. check/lock/account use visible fills (fine).

selfChecks.firstPassSelfFix: List/Default chevron rendered as black square (invisible fill turned opaque by blanket recolor). Self-fixed: replaced with fresh chevron recolored via strokes. Container height left to hug (avoids prior FIXED-resize clipping).

edits_2026-07-06.summary: Footer button labels updated + Dark spec frame added.
edits_2026-07-06.labelFontMethod: Pretendard unloadable in MCP plugin on this PC. Authored via temp 'Noto Sans KR' Medium (Korean-capable) then rebound body/16M text style (S:886ca7...) via setTextStyleIdAsync. Final fontName=Pretendard Medium, textStyleId=body/16M on all 3. (First attempt used Inter — no Korean glyphs — corrected to Noto.)

darkSpec.name: Bottom Sheet — Spec Dark
darkSpec.placementHistory: 2026-07-06: (a) built at x25800,y1100 but on WRONG page (공통 80:16696 — currentPage at creation); (b) moved to x27176,y560; (c) moved back to x25800,y1100; (d) re-parented from 공통 (80:16696) to Core page (5:5706) via core.appendChild(881:2) — verified parent=5:5706, 공통 page no longer contains it (stillInOldPage=0). Now same x=25800 column as Option set (865:17 @y0) and light container (868:9184 @y560), all three on Core. Column y0/y560/y1100, no overlap (light ends y1016 < 1100).
darkSpec.fill: bound to color/bg/level-0 (VariableID:687:17884) — resolves dark under Dark mode
darkSpec.note: Instances of the light container variants (labels already updated). Dark shown via explicit Dark variable mode on the frame — no detach/duplicate. Placed directly below the light container set in the same x=25800 column (Option y0, light y560, dark y1100).
darkSpec.darkModeBugFix_2026-07-06: Symptom: secondary '취소' button rendered white in dark frame. Cause: the 3 footer Button INSTANCES (I881:33;868:6151, I881:65;868:6174, I881:65;868:6176) carried their own explicitVariableModes {Semantic Color V2 8:963 -> 8:1 Light}, overriding the frame's Dark. All button colors (color/button/bg|border|label/*) live in Semantic Color V2 (8:963) — no separate button collection. Fix: cleared the explicit Light mode on those 3 instances via clearExplicitVariableModeForCollection(8:963) so they inherit the frame's Dark (8:2). Verified render: '취소' now dark bg (gray-dark/100) + light label, '적용' stays blue; surfaces/list/text still dark (no regression). Frame keeps 8:963->8:2. raw hex 0.

edits_2026-07-06.renderLimitation: Pretendard is not installed on this PC (hasMissingFont=true; documented env constraint), so freshly-edited labels initially rendered blank in the MCP preview (cloud render lag / baking). After relocating the dark frame (2026-07-06) the cloud re-rendered and the button labels '적용'/'취소' now display correctly in both light and dark. Data scan is authoritative regardless: chars/fontName(Pretendard)/textStyleId(body/16M) all correct.
